releases.label: 4FGL
releases.summary: Fourth Fermi-LAT catalog of gamma-ray sources — 5,064 sources above 4 sigma significance based on the first eight years of science data in the 50 MeV to 1 TeV range; deepest gamma-ray catalog yet in this energy range, with an updated Galactic diffuse emission model and two sets of light curves

releases.label: 4FGL-DR3
releases.summary: Incremental Data Release 3 of the 4FGL catalog — 6,658 sources from the first 12 years of science data (50 MeV to 1 TeV); more sources fit with curved spectra, more robust spectral parameterization for pulsars, spectral points extended to 1 TeV

releases.label: 4FGL-DR4
releases.summary: Incremental Data Release 4 of the 4FGL catalog — 7,194 gamma-ray sources from the first 14 years of science data (2008-08-04 to 2022-08-02, 50 MeV to 1 TeV), using the same analysis methods as 4FGL-DR3 with a few improvements; spectral parameters, SEDs, light curves and associations updated for all sources. Current FITS version gll_psc_v35 (updated 2024-07-24). Reference paper is arXiv-only on ADS at seed time.
